name: cloud-itonami-isic-6492
comment: Edge build (docs/adr/0002-http-edge-loan-intake.md): shadow-cljs compiles src/credit/edge/*.cljc's :cljs branch (see shadow-cljs.edn :edge-api build) into functions/edge/loan-edge-core.js, re-exported by the thin functions/api/loan/*.js shims -- mirroring cloud-itonami-commitment-ledger's own :edge-api build.
